title: More Materials
description: this mod adds new things to Minecraft
body:
**🧱✨ More Materials Mod**  

[discord](https://discord.gg/xAXbnJxABJ)  

More Materials is a Minecraft mod that expands your world with brand-new ores, blocks, tools, weapons, and armor sets 

**🧱 New Blocks**  

 All ores can be refined into new blocks allowing you to:  
  
- Build stronger and more Decorate your world with unique materials 
  
- These blocks add more creativity and variety to building styles

**🎮 Gameplay Experience**  

More Materials improves Minecraft progression by:  

Adding more reasons to mine   
Expanding crafting options 
Improving combat varieties 
add more advancments to minecraft


**🌲 biomes**

NEW BIOME with blue color called thunderroot grove its add new wood sets and add fruit called chargedberry and neonjungle with neon green color its add fruit called neonmelon and galaxybiome it color purple and its fruit called galaxystar which when you eat it,it will give you galaxytardust that when you hold it on your hand it will give glow and particles and stonehills that have stonehill structures and on those structures wet stone and when it rain it will become wet ore

**💎 The Ores**  

- firsta ore in overworld  
  
- amethyst ore in the end  
  
- embar ore in overworld  
  
- peridot ore in overworld  
  
- New section of emerald armor and sword,shovel,axe,pickaxe,hoe
  
- oceanite ore in different types of ocean  
  
- icesta ore  in the overworld  
  
- volite ore in overworld
  
- shadowwite ore in overworld
  
- terrnite ore in overworld

- starfall ore in overworld

- Rootstone ore in overworld

- galaxy ore in galaxy biome

- darkleaf in world surface

- wet ore in stonehill structures

**_please write your ideas for new things in discord_**  


**🌍 Summary**  

More Materials is a complete expansion mod that adds new ores, blocks, tools, weapons, and armor sets to Minecraft It is perfect for players who want more progression, more crafting options, and more adventure in their world.
